problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.
